articles.title: US routs Canada in Para ice hockey final to complete historic clean sweep in Olympics, Paralympics
articles.description:
“I’m glad we got it done because I think there’s a little bit more pressure with the men and women getting the golds too,” captain Josh Pauls said.

The post US routs Canada in Para ice hockey final to complete historic clean sweep in Olympics, Paralympics appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US Para ice hockey team defeats Canada, achieving a historic clean sweep in 2026.
Captain Josh Pauls emphasizes pressure from previous gold medals in Olympics and Paralympics.
Boston residents celebrate the US team's success, boosting local pride and sports engagement.

articles.title: FCC chair threatens to revoke broadcasters’ licenses over war coverage
articles.description:
The comment from Brendan Carr came on the heels of a social media message from President Trump criticizing the news media’s coverage of the war with Iran.

The post FCC chair threatens to revoke broadcasters’ licenses over war coverage appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: FCC Chair Brendan Carr threatens to revoke licenses for biased war coverage.
Threat follows President Trump's criticism of media's reporting on the Iran conflict.
Boston broadcasters may face scrutiny over compliance with federal coverage standards.

articles.title: Anti-Muslim rhetoric rises among Republicans with little pushback from GOP leadership
articles.description:
The derogatory language has been percolating among Republican officials for months, often prominent when criticizing New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani, who is Muslim.

The post Anti-Muslim rhetoric rises among Republicans with little pushback from GOP leadership appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Anti-Muslim rhetoric has increased among Republican officials, affecting community relations in Boston.
Criticism has been particularly directed at New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani, a Muslim leader.
Lack of GOP leadership pushback may embolden similar sentiments in local political discourse.
